title: [Cloud] Flamingo - Unpairing the charge case from the headset
scenario: Verify that unpairing the charge case from the headset results in the device appearing as a standalone headset ("Voyager Legend 50") with only headset info on the cloud web page.
steps: 1) In the app, go to Device Settings > Reset Device, then tap 'Clear' next to 'Clear Trusted Device list'.
2) Remove the device from the app and from the phone's Bluetooth settings.
3) On the cloud web page, find and remove the device.
4) Reconnect the headset to the app.
5) Go to the cloud web page and find the device.
expected: After unpairing, the device appears as a standalone headset only ("Voyager Legend 50") with only headset info/image visible on the cloud web page.
